title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLVI. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Up hill and down dale;
        Butter is made in every vale,
        And if that Nancy Cook
        Is a good girl,
        She shall have a spouse,
        And make butter anon,
        Before her old grandmother
        Grows a young man.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLVI. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
